description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, package, and deploy, using Ubuntu Xenial and Trusty Docker images and a global before_script that updates apt, installs openssh-client, git, cmake, wget, ruby, build-essential, scons and various dev libraries, starts ssh-agent, adds $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, sets known_hosts, clones the Godot repository if missing, and defines BUILD_DATE, BUILD_COMMIT and BUILD_VERSION variables. In the build stage add a build:html5 job (ubuntu:xenial) that runs: cd "$HOME"; wget https://s3.amazonaws.com/mozilla-games/emscripten/releases/emsdk-portable.tar.gz; tar xf emsdk-portable.tar.gz; cd emsdk-portable/; ./emsdk update; ./emsdk install latest; ./emsdk activate latest; source ./emsdk_env.sh; export EMSCRIPTEN_ROOT=$(em-config EMSCRIPTEN_ROOT); cd "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/godot/"; patch --forward methods.py ../always_tty.patch; scons platform=javascript wasm=yes tools=no target=release_debug progress=no -j$(nproc); scons platform=javascript wasm=yes tools=no target=release progress=no -j$(nproc); scons platform=javascript wasm=no tools=no target=release_debug progress=no -j$(nproc); scons platform=javascript wasm=no tools=no target=release progress=no -j$(nproc); mkdir -p ../artifacts/; mv bin/godot.*.zip ../artifacts/, and a build:linux_editor job (ubuntu:trusty) that runs: patch --forward methods.py ../always_tty.patch; scons platform=x11 tools=yes target=release_debug progress=no -j$(nproc); strip bin/godot.x11.opt.tools.64; mkdir -p ../artifacts/; mv bin/godot.x11.opt.tools.64 ../artifacts/, plus a build:linux_templates job (ubuntu:trusty) that runs: patch --forward methods.py ../always_tty.patch; scons platform=x11 tools=no target=release_debug progress=no -j$(nproc); scons platform=x11 tools=no target=release progress=no -j$(nproc); strip bin/godot.*.64; mkdir -p ../artifacts/; mv bin/godot.*.64 ../artifacts/, each publishing the artifacts/ directory with a 2‑day expiration. In the package stage add a package:html5 job (ubuntu:xenial) depending on build:html5 that runs: cd ../artifacts/; mkdir templates/; mv godot.javascript.opt.debug.webassembly.zip templates/webassembly_debug.zip; mv godot.javascript.opt.webassembly.zip templates/webassembly_release.zip; mv godot.javascript.opt.debug.zip templates/javascript_debug.zip; mv godot.javascript.opt.zip templates/javascript_release.zip; a package:linux_editor job (ubuntu:trusty) depending on build:linux_editor that runs: mkdir -p appdir/usr/bin/ appdir/usr/share/icons/ ../artifacts/editor/; mv ../artifacts/godot.x11.opt.tools.64 appdir/usr/bin/godot; mv misc/dist/appimage/godot.desktop appdir/godot.desktop; mv icon.svg appdir/usr/share/icons/godot.svg; wget https://github.com/probonopd/linuxdeployqt/releases/download/continuous/linuxdeployqt-continuous-x86_64.AppImage; chmod +x linuxdeployqt-continuous-x86_64.AppImage; ./linuxdeployqt-continuous-x86_64.AppImage --appimage-extract; ./squashfs-root/AppRun appdir/godot.desktop -appimage; mv Godot_Engine-x86_64.AppImage ../artifacts/editor/Godot-Linux-x86_64.AppImage; and a package:linux_templates job (ubuntu:trusty) depending on build:linux_templates that runs: cd ../artifacts/; mkdir -p templates/; mv godot.x11.opt.debug.64 templates/linux_x11_64_debug; mv godot.x11.opt.64 templates/linux_x11_64_release; cp templates/linux_x11_64_debug templates/linux_x11_32_debug; cp templates/linux_x11_64_release templates/linux_x11_32_release, each also publishing the artifacts/ directory. Finally, in the deploy stage add deploy:html5, deploy:linux_editor, and deploy:linux_templates jobs (ubuntu:xenial) that depend on their respective package jobs and execute the shared deploy script: cd ../; mv artifacts/ "$BUILD_VERSION/"; scp -r "$BUILD_VERSION/" "$DEPLOY_USER@$DEPLOY_SERVER:$DEPLOY_PATH/", using the DEPLOY_PATH, DEPLOY_SERVER and DEPLOY_USER variables.
